# Templates

These templates are empty public-safe starting points.

CSV templates can be opened in a spreadsheet tool. Markdown templates can be edited as plain text.

## Available Files

- [NIS2 control register template](nis2-control-register-template.csv)
- [Evidence record template](evidence-record-template.csv)
- [Deliverable tracker template](deliverable-tracker-template.csv)
- [Risk register template](risk-register-template.csv)
- [Public release checklist template](public-release-checklist-template.csv)
- [Rules of Engagement public template](rules-of-engagement-public-template.md)
